title: HOMEOWNER ASSISTANCE AND RECONSTRUCTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON HOUSING AND COMMUNITY SERVICES HOMEOWNER ASSISTANCE AND RECONSTRUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to homeowners whose properties were damaged or destroyed by wildfires and/or straight-line winds in 2020. Assistance may include: -Repairing an originally damaged or replacement stick-built or manufactured home -Building a new stick-built home on owned or leased land -Replacing a damaged manufactured home on land a homeowner owns, leases, or will secure a lease for -Purchasing a stick-built or manufactured home that is already installed Cannot reimburse any money a homeowner has already spent to repair or restore their home. New owners of a home damaged in the disaster are not eligible for HARP assistance. Cannot assist with second homes, foreclosed homes, recreational vehicles, campers, detached structures, housing units that are not permitted, mixed-use buildings, and multiplexes with five or more units. Eligibility: -Homeowners whose home was damaged or destroyed due to wildfires and/or straight-line winds in 2020 -Have remaining construction repairs of at least $3,000 -Home must be primary residence -Must be in good standing or payment plan with mortgage and property taxes Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 250-0938 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 250-0938 Toll-free (877) 510-6800 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: -Proof of ownership for a home damaged or destroyed by wildfires and/or straight-line winds in 2020 -Proof that the damaged or destroyed home was a primary residence -Proof of current income -Details about other insurance or other disaster recovery assistance funds received -Proof of identity (such as photo ID) AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Douglas, Jackson, Klamath, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Disaster Related Cash Grants Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing * Disaster/Emergency Issues Home Rehabilitation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING SUPPORT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - MANUFACTURED AND MARINA COMMUNITIES RESOURCE CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - OREGON EVICTION PREVENTION RAPID RESPONSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
